evals.prompt: Add a POST /orders route to our Hono API that validates the request body (a customer id and a list of line items) and returns the created order with a 201.
evals.expected_output: A feature-grouped route under src/routes/orders/ where the Zod request and response schemas live in a separate schema.ts, the route is declared with createRoute including a request body schema, the handler reads validated input via c.req.valid('json') and returns 201, and the router is an OpenAPIHono mounted on the root app.
assertions: Defines the route with createRoute, not a bare app.post handler
Request and response Zod schemas live in a separate schema.ts file co-located in the route's feature directory
Handler reads the body via c.req.valid('json') rather than c.req.json()
Route declares a request body schema and a 201 response in createRoute
Router is an OpenAPIHono instance mounted via app.route() rather than registered on the root app directly

evals.prompt: We receive several event types (payment.succeeded, payment.failed, refund.created) on a single /webhooks/payments endpoint. Wire it up so adding a new event type later doesn't touch the route or grow a switch statement.
evals.expected_output: A single webhook endpoint that verifies the signature, parses the payload, and delegates to a dispatcher which routes by event type to one strategy class per event, each implementing a shared strategy interface, with a typed NoopStrategy fallback that returns 200 for unhandled-but-valid events.
assertions: Uses one endpoint with a dispatcher keyed on the event type, not one endpoint per event
Each event type is a separate strategy class implementing a shared strategy interface
The handler contains no if/switch chain over event types
A typed NoopStrategy (or equivalent default) returns 200 for valid events with no registered strategy
Strategy classes delegate I/O to service classes and contain only flow logic

evals.prompt: Create a payments service to hold our charge/refund business logic, kept out of the route handlers and unit-testable in isolation.
evals.expected_output: A noun-grouped service under src/services/payments/ with a service.interface.ts declaring an IPaymentService (or IPaymentsService) contract and a service.ts whose class implements that interface, exporting a singleton typed as the interface, containing no Hono Context references.
assertions: Service is a class implementing an I<Noun>Service interface declared in a separate service.interface.ts
Service directory is named by the noun (e.g. services/payments/), not by a verb
The service contains no Hono imports, Context, or 'c' references
Exports a singleton instance typed as the interface for consumers to import
Service schemas live in a co-located schema.ts within the service directory

evals.prompt: Expose auto-generated OpenAPI documentation for the API so we never hand-maintain the spec.
evals.expected_output: The root OpenAPIHono app serves the OpenAPI document via app.doc(), generated from the existing createRoute definitions, with no hand-written YAML or JSON spec file.
assertions: OpenAPI document is served via app.doc() on an OpenAPIHono app
The spec is derived from createRoute definitions, not hand-written
No standalone hand-maintained openapi.yaml/openapi.json spec file is authored
Routes contributing to the docs are declared with createRoute and Zod schemas
